problem id: a6082142
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(3) AND NOT SHL(1)

examples:
  01001011 -> 01001000
  11011011 -> 01001000
  00011010 -> 11000000
  10000000 -> 00000100
  00000000 -> 00000000
  11101101 -> 00100101
  10110111 -> 10010001
  01111000 -> 00000011
  01111001 -> 00001001

query: 11010010
predicted answer: 00010010
